title: Fix ERD Not Rendering Relationships for Opportunity Object
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see entity relationships when visualizing an Opportunity object in the ERD, so that I can understand how Opportunity connects to other objects.
description:
## Bug
When visualizing an Opportunity object in the ERD, the entity relationships do not render. The diagram shows the object node but no relationship lines.

## Fix
Fixed the ERD query or rendering logic that was failing to display relationships for the Opportunity object. Deployed to dev.
acceptance_criteria: Opportunity object renders with its entity relationships in the ERD
Relationship lines are visible for all lookup fields on Opportunity
Other objects continue to render correctly
ux_changes: Opportunity object now correctly displays entity relationships in the ERD diagram.
middleware_changes: Fixed the ERD data query/rendering logic that was failing for the Opportunity object.
implementation_notes: Bug was specific to the Opportunity object — likely a missing primary object reference in the ERD query. Fixed on dev.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue on dev and asked whether it should be pushed to production.
